overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player walks under elevated highways, crosses intersections, and passes by holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers with wet reflective streets.

events.description: passing an npc in blue jacket and red pants walking ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and beams of elevated highway dominating the view
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
palm tree in rectangular planter on sidewalk edge
short black and yellow traffic posts lining the curb

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete highway overpass in a futuristic city at night. The sidewalk is wet and reflective, with palm trees and traffic bollards lining the path. A large digital billboard is visible on the left as the camera approaches an intersection ahead.

events.description: exiting covered overpass into open intersection with visible sky
futuristic black sedan drives past on the left side of the frame
small teal compact car crosses the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: sleek black futuristic sedan driving through the intersection
small teal compact car crossing the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
traffic signal pole showing green walk indication
digital speed limit sign displaying 40 in white text
tall modern building with illuminated windows and reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into a wide open intersection. The camera crosses the street at a zebra crossing, passing a traffic light showing green. Futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection while glass office towers rise in the background under the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at towering skyscrapers and overhead bridge structures
passing by a futuristic bus stop shelter with illuminated advertisement panels

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing various npcs and observing the neon billboards

notable_agents.action: person with red hair and white shirt standing then walking along the sidewalk
person in red jacket and gold pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: continuous wall of glowing neon advertisements and holographic displays in yellow and blue
overhead pedestrian bridge connecting buildings with illuminated edges
futuristic bus stop with glass panels and glowing yellow interior lighting
3D holographic display projecting rotating product images above the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk flanked by a continuous wall of neon billboards on the right and a street with parked cars on the left. The camera passes various pedestrians and briefly looks up at the towering skyscrapers and overhead walkways. A futuristic bus stop shelter appears on the left midway through.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with nightclub entrance and overhead red banners

events.description: approaching intersection with illuminated MARQUESS club sign visible ahead
crossing the street at the crosswalk toward the MARQUESS club entrance
white sports car and red sedan passing through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while heading toward the MARQUESS club area

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving through the intersection followed by a red sedan
person in dark clothing crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated golden sign reading MARQUESS above nightclub entrance
red rectangular banners suspended across the street on wires
elevated roadway or monorail track crossing above the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection dominated by the illuminated MARQUESS club sign. Red banners hang overhead across the street. The camera crosses the crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection, with an overhead bridge structure visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadowed depths of a concrete overpass into the vibrant, neon-saturated heart of a futuristic city. It begins beneath a massive highway structure on a wet, reflective sidewalk lined with palm trees, moving steadily toward a distant intersection. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the space opens into a wide crossing where futuristic vehicles glide past glass office towers under the night sky. The scene then shifts into a narrow corridor flanked by a wall of glowing billboards and parked cars, passing pedestrians and a bus shelter before glancing up at towering skyscrapers and overhead walkways. Finally, the path leads toward a major intersection dominated by the illuminated MARQUESS club sign and red overhead banners, crossing the street beneath a high bridge structure.
